name: Custom Reviews
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you are not using a specific platform for reviews, we offer a way to integrate your reviews within our products, thanks to a review feed."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The review feed is a file, publicly available, that Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) can download at any moment. We support these formats: "},{"text":"json","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"jsonl","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"csv","bold":true}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Format of the review feed"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each review must be composed of the next 3 information:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"product_id","bold":true},{"text":": String representing your product ID"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"rating","bold":true},{"text":": Double containing the average score of the reviews on your product"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"count","bold":true},{"text":": Int representing the total number of reviews on your product"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"JSONJSONLCSV"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"[{\"product_id\":\"7398263\",\"rating\":4.8,\"count\":5},{\"product_id\":\"3726293\",\"rating\":3.7,\"count\":13},{\"product_id\":\"2638351\",\"rating\":5,\"count\":1},{\"product_id\":\"1653590\",\"rating\":3.8,\"count\":28}]","code":true}]}],"lang":"json"},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enable the reviews"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Send an email to "},{"type":"a","url":"mailto:support@maropost.com","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"support@maropost.com"}]},{"text":" with your URL containing all the reviews information formatted like the above. We will enable the reviews for you on your products."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
